stories.title: **Headline:** OU at A&M Game 2 Tonight — Wells at 36 HR, One From Tying 31-Year NCAA Record

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells is at 36 HOME RUNS.

One from tying a 31-year-old NCAA record.
Two from breaking it outright.

Game 2 at Texas A&M is tonight — 5 PM CT on SEC Network.

Every at-bat is a history lesson in progress.

#Softball #NCAASoftball #Sooners

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
No. 1 Oklahoma vs. No. 12 Texas A&M — TONIGHT 5 PM CT on SEC Network.

One more OU win = outright SEC title.
Kendall Wells needs ONE homer to tie the all-time NCAA record.

College Park. College Station. History waits for no one.

#NCAASoftball #Softball #Sooners

stories.title: **Headline:** SEC Tournament Seeding Battle — Final Weekend Decides Double Byes, National Seeds

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
SEC Tournament is 4 days away.

Where things stand:

No. 1 Oklahoma — 18-3 SEC (double bye)
No. 2 Florida — 16-5 SEC (double bye)
No. 3 Alabama — 15-5 SEC (in range)

Top 4 = no play until Thursday.

#Softball #SECSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
The top 4 NCAA seeds get to HOST their own regional.

Oklahoma is a lock.
Texas Tech is in the conversation.
Nebraska is knocking.
Florida and Alabama are fighting for position.

May 10 (ESPN2, 7 PM ET) can't get here fast enough.

#NCAASoftball #Softball

stories.title: **Headline:** Nebraska Closes Regular Season at Penn State — 13-Game Streak, National Seed Chase

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Nebraska softball steps into Penn State TODAY.

40 wins. 20-1 Big Ten. 13-game win streak.

Game 1 is at 4 PM CT on Big Ten Network.

The Huskers are rolling toward a Big Ten Tournament title and a home regional. Don't sleep on Lincoln.

#Huskers #BigTen #NCAASoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Texas Tech Ready for Oklahoma City — 47-4 Red Raiders Enter Big 12 Tournament

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Texas Tech softball. 47-4. Back-to-back Big 12 champions.

NiJaree Canady. 1,000+ career K's. Most dominant pitcher in the country.

Big 12 Tournament opens May 7 in Oklahoma City.

The Red Raiders are hunting.

#TexasTech #NCAASoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** OU Paces Nation with Four USA Softball Player of the Year Finalists

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Four Sooners. One list.

Oklahoma leads the nation with FOUR players on the USA Softball Collegiate Player of the Year Top 25:

🔹 Kendall Wells — 36 HR, .377 BA, 79 RBI
🔹 Gabbie Garcia — 22 HR, 66 RBI
🔹 Kai Minor
🔹 Ella Parker

Top 10 announced May 13.

#Sooners #NCAASoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Conference Tournament Schedule — All Roads Lead to Postseason

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Conference tournament week is HERE.

📅 SEC: May 5-9 (Lexington, KY)
📅 Big Ten: May 6-9 (College Park, MD)
📅 Big 12: May 7-9 (Devon Park, OKC)
📅 ACC: May 6-9 (Charlottesville, VA)

Selection Show: May 10, 7 PM ET on ESPN2.

Who are you watching?

#NCAASoftball #Softball

stories.title: **Headline:** WCWS Countdown — 27 Days to Oklahoma City

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
27 days until the Women's College World Series.

Devon Park. Oklahoma City. May 28.

The Selection Show drops May 10 at 7 PM ET on ESPN2.

16 national seeds will HOST their own regional.

The bracket is almost here. Get ready.

#WCWS #NCAASoftball #Softball
